# llms-full.txt for @codexstar/pi-agent-teams

## Repository purpose

`@codexstar/pi-agent-teams` is a Pi extension that brings Claude-style agent-team workflows to Pi: teammate spawning, shared task lists, mailbox messaging, hooks/quality gates, and optional isolated git worktrees.

## Start here

- README.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/COMPATIBILITY.md
- SECURITY.md
- SUPPORT.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- GOVERNANCE.md
- MAINTAINERS.md
- CHANGELOG.md

## Important source files

### Runtime entrypoints
- extensions/teams/index.ts
- extensions/teams/leader.ts
- extensions/teams/worker.ts

### Task / state model
- extensions/teams/task-store.ts
- extensions/teams/team-config.ts
- extensions/teams/mailbox.ts
- extensions/teams/event-log.ts
- extensions/teams/heartbeat-lease.ts

### Lifecycle / orchestration
- extensions/teams/teammate-rpc.ts
- extensions/teams/process-control.ts
- extensions/teams/leader-lifecycle-commands.ts
- extensions/teams/leader-teams-tool.ts
- extensions/teams/worktree.ts

### UX / controls
- extensions/teams/teams-panel.ts
- extensions/teams/teams-widget.ts
- extensions/teams/leader-info-commands.ts
- extensions/teams/leader-task-commands.ts

### Policy / hooks
- extensions/teams/hooks.ts
- extensions/teams/model-policy.ts
- extensions/teams/max-workers-policy.ts

## Tests / verification

Primary verification commands:

- bun run typecheck
- bun run lint
- bun run smoke-test

High-signal integrations:

- bun run integration-rpc-ready-handshake-test
- bun run integration-hooks-remediation-test
- bun run integration-claim-test
- node scripts/e2e-rpc-test.mjs

## Operator notes

- `/team env <name>` prints both POSIX and PowerShell startup instructions.
- Windows launcher: `scripts/start-team-windows.ps1`
- macOS/Linux tmux launcher: `scripts/start-tmux-team.sh`
- GitHub community docs live at repo root and `.github/`.
